item.title: Love ewe
item.description: https://www.farmsanctuary.org · Farm Sanctuary rescues sheep from a variety of industries and gives them a home where they are given the highest standard of care. Please make a donation to support their work.

item.title: Dump of allsort things, funny, aww or satisfying.
item.description:
Perfectly separating the fibers to sharpen the rug’s design.
Lattice pastry roller cutter.
Slicing potato into a thin net.
The way these are rolled and then broken into pieces.
"Pastel de Nata" is a fine dessert !
Sewer.
Plastic Welder.
Fascinating little Roebling device that is used to quickly calculate electrical wire resistance per foot, based on wire diameter.
Crab Smoking Cigarette - Wild. I had to stop, and he does it ...
You never know who's watching...
Simple wood !
Red car stopped a truck losing its load.
Clean the glass until it looks like new
"The Odyssey" IMAX 70mm Setup.
Gift for girlfriend !
It's not how you start but How you Finish.
Getting ejected at 80 miles per hour from a vehicle traveling 80 miles per hour (on purpose).
The shear might of a Cybertruck !
A bunch of people going for a walk under clear water.
It brings genuine joy to see moments like this.
The hammer spin is what did it for me.
A death trap.
That is pretty neat !
Beautiful voice !
Fast almond slicing.
Saddle stitching line.
The "Jupe" expanding table was patented in 1835 by English cabinetmaker Robert Jupe. Retail cost $10,000.
An exhibition piece recreating the moon's gravity...
Happy birthday with a quill.
Maybe maybe maybe ...
The Arch of Ctesiphon, a 1500 year old building in what was the former capital of the Persian Empire, it's one of the largest single-span vault of unreinforced brickwork in the world.
Boss-level Drone Navigation. he trained ...
Brotherly love while racing ....
Snow over the ancient canals of Suzhou, China.
Silent movies did some pretty crazy shots with trains ...
Pipa Yuan (枇杷园) is the largest Hot Pot restaurant in the world. The dining establishment has roughly 900 tables and can seat up to 5,851 diners at a time.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Israel = NAZI Regime
item.description: FP Edit: Want to fight back? Use the No Thanks app. It allows you to scan barcode of products to tell you if the product's manufacturer supports Israel or exploiting the Gaza holocaust. They will provide links and sources of articles as well that proves it.

24
25
26 Man Tax: Alex Fine
The older I grow, the more I listen to people who don't talk much. -Germain G. Glien So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1753 (approximate accuracy)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Small Gods and Night Watch are my favorite books of Pratchett, but Thud and Carpe Jugulum are close thirds.
As an Arizonan, I specialize in Cruel and Unusual Geography
Whenever I wear my Bronze collar or a torque in costume now, this meme pops into my head.
Every time I look at this, this meme/painting gets better, and honestly I would hang it on my wall.
I would use this as a gun and design a character around it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What doing? Whatchoo talking about? AAAAAAAAAAAAH. No. I love you. You're a good boy. Aaaaaaaaaaaaah." ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: RIP Nick Dale
item.description: https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/british-columbia/helicopter-pilot-killed-wildfire-colorado-9.7269241 https://skiesmag.com/news/bc-helicopter-pilot-killed-in-colorado-wildfire-crash/ These shitstains are demanding that smoke from the 200 fires buring in northern Ontario “not be allowed” to cross the border into the U.S.: Claudia Tenney (R-NY), John James (R-MI), Jack Bergman (R-MI), John Moolenaar (R-MI), and Lisa McClain (R-MI). tRump complained that the smoke is “unnecessarily invading” the U.S. and is going to add new 50% tariffs on Canadian goods. Smoke from U.S. wildfires frequently “invades” Canada, too. We don’t bitch or make threats, we help you fight the fires and one of our pilots died helping you. Your air and water pollution cross the border, too, as did a lot of ash from Mount St Helens. When ice storms or hurricanes destroy your power grids, we send crews to help restore them. Do not ever wonder why a majority of Canadians now see the U.S. as an enemy. Not just an annoyance. Not just a problem. An enemy. Ponder that reality.

item.title: The red fail.
item.description: It's funny to me that conservatives in America scream about communism this communism that it's their calling card as of the last few years But if you were to observe actual communist leaders like Stalin You would see that the Trump administration Is very keen on the authoritarian communist ideal Let me explain briefly Very briefly The Trump administration has done everything to centralize power They're trying to make Trump the sole figurehead of their platform They're trying to Have him control the economy multiple times he's Asked corporations to set the price and fix prices for various things. This is not a new ideal This is very quote-unquote communist Now if we were to dive deeper into the definition of communism Surely he would not fit all the marks Get it. It's a pun Also, what is this, a sign for ants? They must not have a budget.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: A Massive Hook-Shaped Coronal Hole Has Opened on the Sun
item.description:
A Massive Hook-Shaped Coronal Hole Has Opened on the Sun A large, hook-shaped coronal hole has developed on the Earth-facing side of the Sun, stretching more than 400,000 miles (about 650,000 km) across portions of both the northern and southern solar hemispheres. Coronal holes are regions where the Sun's magnetic field opens into space, allowing high-speed streams of solar wind to escape more easily. Because this coronal hole is now facing Earth, forecasters expect an enhanced stream of solar wind to reach our planet over the coming days. If conditions align, the interaction between the solar wind and Earth's magnetic field could trigger minor to moderate geomagnetic storm activity, increasing the chances of seeing auroras at higher latitudes and causing brief disturbances to radio communications and satellite operations. The exact strength of any geomagnetic storm will depend on the speed and magnetic orientation of the incoming solar wind. While coronal holes are a normal feature of the Sun's activity, large Earth-facing holes like this are closely monitored because they can significantly influence space weather... https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=c0HEjD1lrww And more info https://www.spaceweather.gov/phenomena/coronal-holes https://www.spaceweather.gov/products/3-day-forecast  https://www.techtimes.com/articles/320998/20260720/coronal-hole-push-solar-wind-past-700-km-s-bringing-possible-aurora-seattle-oslo.htm
Captured by NASA’s Solar Dynamics Observatory on July 18, the enormous dark formation curls down the solar surface like a giant hook. Coronal holes are cooler, less-dense regions where the Sun’s magnetic field opens into space, allowing fast-moving solar wind to escape. As the feature rotates into an Earth-facing position, space-weather forecasters will watch for possible geomagnetic activity and increased aurora chances in the days ahead. The image was recorded in extreme ultraviolet light, which makes the Sun’s hotter active regions glow while the coronal hole appears almost black. A striking reminder that our star is anything but quiet.
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: Embarrassed again on the world stage.
item.description:
This not-battistic flesh lump of a man thinks everything is about him. I have never seen somebody this involved with themselves other than this man.
Everybody that surrounds him has to treat him like a senile child.
Don't believe it happened? Here's the full video from an angle that's not from press.
Congratulations, Spain. I'm glad you smashed our Argentina. My last deployment, I spent a lot of time with the Spanish army. Pretty cool people. stoked that I know some of them are celebrating right now
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.description: Looking for Better Privacy? Not all apps collect the same amount of data. If privacy matters to you, consider privacy-focused alternatives like Signal for messaging, Brave for browsing, and Proton Mail for email. The best choice depends on your needs and how you use your devices. Question for everyone: Which app have you switched for better privacy, or which privacy-focused app would you recommend?
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: The Trump admin's case against the former Olympic canoeist accused of damaging the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool is about to fall apart. They failed to preserve the physical evidence against him–the lining of the pool that he is accused of damaging.
